content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "Built-in ad blocker" and "AI-powered suggestions" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1-3), but ContentView.swift is only a simple task list with no content-blocker extension, ML/CoreML imports, or browsing code anywhere in the project.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps under 2.1 when marketing text promises features the binary does not deliver, since reviewers test claims directly. The code shows a plain SwiftUI list (App/ContentView.swift:3-19) with no ad-blocking, AI, or browsing functionality, so both prominent claims are unsupported. Remove or rewrite these claims, or implement the features before submission; "works fully offline" is trivially true for a local list but the other two will not survive review.
